previousDayImpact: France's victory provided a significant boost to Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard, helping Team Godfather secure the top spot.
Norway's win over Ivory Coast created separation for Team Megatronless and Team Jordan, who were the only entries to benefit from that result.
Mexico's win over Ecuador offered minimal point gains for Team Choo Choo and Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, limiting their ability to climb the leaderboard.
leaderboardSummary: Team Godfather has taken over the lead, climbing one spot to first place after a strong performance from France.
Bijan Mustard saw the largest jump, surging six places to third overall thanks to a 19-point gain.
Team Megatronless also made a notable move, climbing four spots to fourth place following Norway's success.
leverageWatch: The upcoming match between Bosnia & Herzegovina and USA is a critical pivot point, as it is heavily rostered by eight different entries.
Team Choo Choo has a unique opportunity to gain ground on the leaders if England performs well against DR Congo.
Team koyn is the sole entry with a stake in the Belgium vs. Senegal match, providing them a chance to climb from the bottom of the standings.
